name: Thai Wacoal Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Wacoal Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells finished garments. The company offers ladies' lingerie under the Wacoal, WIENNA, B'me, Sgarlet, Presea, and CW-X brands; ladies' outerwear under the 5.up, Rac√É¬©, and ERAWAN UNIFORMS & WORKWEAR brands; and children wear under the ENFANT, De bon, Amusant, Little Wacoal, ELLE PETITE, and ELLE POUPON brands. It also exports its products to Japan, the United States, and the ASEAN countries. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
